falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 50+ within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 50 indicates extreme momentum divergence, contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and invalidating the UNKNOWN verdict by confirming a potential blowoff top scenario.

falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 breaks above 5000 in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would invalidate the pattern match to bottom_2024_aug (which likely involved a failed breakout), proving the current UNKNOWN verdict incorrect by showing a clear bullish breakout.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 200-day moving average crosses above the 50-day moving average within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This confirmed bullish trend crossover would directly contradict the 'UNKNOWN' phase designation and prove the HOLD signal wrong by showing a clear, observable trend shift.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
